nodes.name: Javan owlet
nodes.summary: The Javan owlet (Glaucidium castanopterum) is a species of owl in the family Strigidae. It is native to the islands of Java and Bali. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Javan owlet (Glaucidium castanopterum) is a species of owl in the family Strigidae. It is native to the islands of Java and Bali.
